'''''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 11''' is the eleventh issue of [[Star Wars Insider|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'']], later rebranded as the ''Star Wars Insider''. Issue 11 was published in Spring [[1990]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
===Features===
*[[Irvin Kershner: Remembering The Empire Strikes Back|Irvin Kershner: Remembering ''The Empire Strikes Back'']] by [[Dan Madsen]]
*''[[Inside ILM]]'' by [[John S. Davis]]
*"10th Anniversary Cast Party" cartoon by [[Lisa E. Cowan]] and [[R. Tomasic]]
*"A Look at the ''[[Star Wars]]'' Collection of [[Stephen J. Sansweet|Stephen Sansweet]]" by Lisa E. Cowan
*"[[Lucasfilm]] Television Involved with New Series"
